panel__about__description_body_p1.message: Synology Torrent Router is a Chrome extension for routing user-selected, authorized torrent and magnet downloads to the user's own Synology Download Station. It keeps the existing Download Station task UI while adding a destination prompt for captured torrent files.

panel__about__description_body_p2.message: The extension does not scrape trackers, bypass login or CAPTCHA, automate content discovery, or provide access to content the user is not authorized to download.

panel__about__limitations_body_p1.message: Quick-connect login is not currently supported due to the lack of official API documentation.

panel__about__limitations_body_p2.message: The public build starts with default tracker coverage for IPTorrents, TorrentLeech, and MyAnonamouse. Additional custom tracker support may require granting site access and a future dynamic content-script registration pass.

panel__about__limitations_body_p3.message: Note that translation on previous version of Chrome (100 and below) might have only partial support in banner notifications.

panel__about__limitations_body_p4.message: Due to MV3 current limitation, the service-worker is maintained awake through periodic messaging on active tab, if no tab is active in the past 5 minutes, service worker and associated functionalities might suspend until wake events.

panel__about__contribute_body.message: Report issues, suggest features, or review the source code through the project links below.

panel__about__credits_body_p1.message: This project is based on dvcol/synology-download, which is MIT licensed. The upstream copyright and license notice are preserved in this distribution.

panel__about__credits_body_p2.message: This extension is not affiliated with Synology Inc., Google, Chrome, dvcol, or any torrent tracker.
